unchangedJobs.title: Expression of Interest - International School of Ticino
unchangedJobs.description:
## Descrizione

- Inspired Education is the leading global group of premium schools, with a portfolio of 121 premium private schools spanning 6 continents which utilise proven educational practices from every corner of the globe, ensuring over 95,000 students receive a world-class learning experience from Kindergarten to Year 13.
- The International School of Ticino (IST) is part of the Inspired Education Group, one of the world's leading premium school groups. Located in Lugano, IST offers a stimulating international learning environment in Ticino.

descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione - Inspired Education is the leading global group of premium schools, with a portfolio of 121 premium private schools spanning 6 continents which utilise proven educational practices from every corner of the globe, ensuring over 95,000 students receive a world-class learning experience from Kindergarten to Year 13. - The International School of Ticino (IST) is part of the Inspired Education Group, one of the world's leading premium school groups. Located in Lugano, IST offers a stimulating international learning environment in Ticino.
descriptionByLocale.it: ## Descrizione - Inspired Education è il principale gruppo globale di scuole premium, con un portafoglio di 121 scuole private premium che si estendono su 6 continenti e utilizzano pratiche educative comprovate da ogni angolo del mondo, garantendo che oltre 95.000 studenti ricevano un'esperienza di apprendimento di classe mondiale dalla scuola materna fino all'anno 13. - La Scuola Internazionale del Ticino (IST) fa parte del gruppo Inspired Education, uno dei principali gruppi di scuole premium al mondo. Situata a Lugano, l'IST offre un ambiente di apprendimento internazionale stimolante in Ticino.
descriptionByLocale.de: ## Beschreibung - Inspired Education ist die führende globale Gruppe von Premium-Schulen mit einem Portfolio von 121 Premium-Privatschulen, die sich über 6 Kontinente erstrecken und bewährte Bildungspraktiken aus allen Ecken der Welt nutzen, um sicherzustellen, dass über 95.000 Schüler eine weltklasse Lernerfahrung vom Kindergarten bis zur Jahrgangsstufe 13 erhalten. - Die Internationale Schule des Tessin (IST) ist Teil der Inspired Education Group, einer der weltweit führenden Gruppen von Premium-Schulen. Die IST befindet sich in Lugano und bietet eine anregende internationale Lernumgebung im Tessin.
descriptionByLocale.fr: ## Description - Inspired Education est le principal groupe mondial d'écoles premium, avec un portefeuille de 121 écoles privées premium réparties sur 6 continents, qui utilisent des pratiques éducatives éprouvées de tous les coins du globe, garantissant que plus de 95 000 étudiants bénéficient d'une expérience d'apprentissage de classe mondiale, de la maternelle à la classe 13. - L'École Internationale du Tessin (IST) fait partie du groupe Inspired Education, l'un des principaux groupes d'écoles premium au monde. Située à Lugano, l'IST offre un environnement d'apprentissage international stimulant au Tessin.

titleByLocale.fr: Expression of Interest - International School of Ticino
titleByLocale.it: Manifestazione di Interesse - Scuola Internazionale del Ticino
titleByLocale.en: Expression of Interest - International School of Ticino
